name: Judar
description:
(first appearance), 23 (now)
__Height:__ 173 cm (5'8")
__Occupation:__ Magi, Magician, Oracle
__Affiliation:__ Al-Thamen (former), Kou Empire (now)

Judar is one of the four Magi in the current era and a Magician who specializes in Ice Magic. He is the former Oracle of Al-Thamen and the Kou Empire after siding with Hakuryuu to aid him in taking over Kou Empire. According to Hakuryuu Ren, the name "Judar" was given by Al-Thamen, and his real name is unknown. He is the one of the main antagonist of the series. "Judar" in arabic means argument, debate, controversy.  

(Source: Magi Wikia)
